query: I have an Obsidian vault with half a Karpathy workflow in it and I honestly do not know what step to run first. Can you inspect the structure and tell me whether this is setup, compile, query, or maintenance work?
My notes feel disconnected and a couple of index pages render strangely in Obsidian. Which workflow step should I run first?
Set up a fresh Obsidian sub-vault as a compile-first AI research knowledge base with raw/wiki/outputs, starter indices, and local guidance files.
Repair this partially initialized vault before I ingest anything else. It has a raw folder and a lonely wiki/index.md but the contract is obviously incomplete.
My vault still has raw, wiki, and outputs, but the local AGENTS.md contract file got deleted. Route me to the right repair step before anyone compiles or queries anything else.
Compile the new markdown notes I dropped under raw/ and update summaries, concepts, and indices without touching the raw files.
I clipped two articles and one repo companion note into raw/. Please sync the compiled wiki layer now.
What do my notes already say about retrieval-augmented generation versus markdown indices? If the answer is substantive, archive it.
Turn my compiled vault into a short X thread about why personal knowledge bases should stay markdown-first before jumping to RAG.
Run a weekly health check on this vault. I care about contradictions, orphan pages, alias drift, stale Q&A, and whether I should upgrade search.
Lint and repair the Obsidian rendering issues in my wiki tables, then tell me which fixes were safe and which still need judgment.
I want a living book in Obsidian instead of redoing RAG every time. How does this workflow hang together, and which step should I start with?
Initialize a second brain vault for reading notes, but keep repo ingestion and entity pages optional unless the domain clearly needs them.
Refresh the wiki because the raw article mtime moved forward and the summary is now stale.
This older vault still compiles fine, but I never regenerated CLAUDE.md after moving it. Compile the new raw notes now and just tell me if there is companion guidance to repair later.
reason: Missing only the companion guidance should not block compile.

query: Search the compiled wiki for everything related to local markdown search, show me the strongest notes, and give short relevance comments.
My compiled wiki is fine structurally, but the Q&A notes are a month old and may conflict with newer source summaries. Please audit drift first.
Help me design a vector retrieval service for SaaS documentation with embeddings, reranking, and a retrieval API. This is not an Obsidian vault.
reason: Search infrastructure design, not this bundle.

query: My Notion workspace needs a better tagging strategy for product notes. Should I rebuild the database or rely on relation properties?
reason: Not an Obsidian compile-first knowledge-base request.

query: Summarize this one article for me in plain English. I do not want to add it to any wiki or archive anything.
reason: Single summarization request without knowledge-base intent.

query: Make a Mermaid architecture diagram for my backend service from the codebase. No Obsidian vault involved.
I already know I need maintenance, not compilation. Run the deep KB health workflow and separate fix-now items from human-review items.
